title: M.Com Jobs 2026 – DEO, Research Assistant and More
shortInfo: Rampur Raza Library Recruitment 2026: 08 DEO, Research Assistant and More vacancies. Apply offline from 23 May to 12 June 2026 at rampur.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: Rampur Raza Library Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for DEO, Research Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rampur Raza Library Recruitment 2026: 08 DEO, Research Assistant and More vacancies. Apply offline from 23 May to 12 June 2026 at rampur.nic.in.

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology/Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence/Data Science, Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Commerce/Accountancy or CA/CS, Bachelor's/Master's Degree in any discipline, Ph.D. in Hindi, Ph.D. in Sanskrit, Bachelor's Degree with Computer Applications Certificate and typing speed
qualification.details: IT Consultant: Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology/Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Data Science from a recognized University/Institution and a minimum of 5 years' work experience in the IT field in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings. Account Consultant: Bachelor's/ Master's Degree in Commerce/ Accountancy from a recognized University/Institution or Chartered Accountant/ Company Secretary and 7 years' experience in the field of Accounts in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings. Administrative Consultant: Bachelor's/Master's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution and 7 years' experience in the field of Administration in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings. Research Assistant-Hindi: Ph.D. Degree in Hindi from a recognized University and 3 years' experience in the field of research, translation or manuscript studies. Research Assistant-Sanskrit: Ph.D. Degree in Sanskrit from a recognized University and 3 years' experience in the field of research, translation or manuscript studies. Typist/Data Entry Operator (Hindi): Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution, One-Year Certificate in Computer Applications, 3 years' experience in the relevant field in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings, and typing speed of 30 words per minute in Hindi on Computer. Typist/Data Entry Operator (English): Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution, One-Year Certificate in Computer Applications, 3 years' experience in the relevant field in any institution of State/Central Government/ Bodies/ Research Institutions/ Universities or Public Sector Undertakings, and typing speed of 35 words per minute in English on Computer.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Rampur Raza Library recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Rampur Raza Library recruitment is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 8 vacancies are available for various Consultant and Assistant posts in the Rampur Raza Library recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these posts is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: What is the salary range for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates ranges from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 55,000/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: What are the minimum qualifications required for the IT Consultant post?
faq.answer: For the IT Consultant post, a Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology/Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence/Data Science and at least 5 years of work experience in the IT field are required.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the Rampur Raza Library recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: What is the minimum experience required for the Account Consultant post?
faq.answer: The Account Consultant post requires 7 years of experience in the field of Accounts, along with a Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Commerce/Accountancy or CA/CS qualification.

faq.question: Are there any specific typing speed requirements for the Typist/Data Entry Operator posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Hindi Typist/Data Entry Operator, a typing speed of 30 words per minute in Hindi is required. For the English post, it's 35 words per minute in English.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be found on the Rampur Raza Library's official website or through the direct links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
